EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when retentions team have sold a policy to signpost to Trustpilot.
EmailTemplate.name: Trustpilot Renewal Review Request
EmailTemplate.subject: Please rate the service I provided
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for purchasing with Kingsbridge!
If you have any questions at any time, please send me an email and I’ll be happy to help.
We use Trustpilot, an independent review service for our reviews. If you were to rate the service I’ve provided and mention my name it would be greatly appreciated.
Review via Trustpilot - https://go.kingsbridge.co.uk/tprsfe-lr
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
